availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

app.rdg: The Lord prayer.
The Lord's Prayer

Gwalhof, belonging.to" Debălh1p.pl.emphatic.pronoun Banfather, degwe2p.sg.emphatic.pronoun ŭābe.there, be.in.existenceWhat's the ŭ here? Perhaps for the glottal onset (uncharacteristically). Wouldn't be the second ʔu entry in BHH, would it? (exclamatory interjection of pleasure or hesitation)??? ălon.along.in.through.at.when kwēa.any(hypothetical,doubtful) Shăkhhigh,up.in.the.air Chirouse does not include the 'r' he almost always puts in this word.! Note capitalization: probably influenced from the prayer's title "Pater Noster" or "Notre Père" or "Our Father".
gʷəɬ dibəɬ bad dəgʷi ʔa ʔal kʷi šəq,

Ălhgood.nice.pretty.beautiful kwe a.any(hypothetical,doubtful) gwassubjunctive-stative oyotomsh-make-tr-pass-3S lilzirhwalhby.what.route,located.where,by.what.means + first,before_(in.time/space)+good.nice.pretty.beautiful tadsgwanon-contrastive.demonstrative+2p.sg.possessive+nominalizer+one's.own atsda!
haʔɬ kʷi gʷəshuyutəbs liɬʤixʷ haʔɬ t(i) adsgʷaʔ ʔə tə sdaʔ!
Degwe gwa Serh-Siamchelh;
dəgʷi gʷəsixʷsiʔab čəɬ,
Ălh kwe gwa chālă tadsgwă adshelrachem, alte swatirten
haʔɬ kʷi gʷəčala t(i) adsgʷaʔ adsčəɬx̌əčəb ʔal tə swatixʷtəd,
Rhōlăbă kw' ō-cha-lă tadsgwa adchel-rha-chem al de Sherk.
x̌ʷulʼəb ʔə kʷ(iʔ)učala t(i) adsgʷaʔ ad(s)šəɬx̌əčəb ʔal diʔ šəq.
Tēēlh sallhen chelh al mek slarhělh, ĭāmliētōbŏlh āltī slar(?).
tiʔiɬ sʔəɬədčəɬ ʔal bəkʼʷ sləx̌il ʔabyitubuɬ ʔal ti sləx̌il.
Klob-chorh ǒrhŭbĭetobolh, uk-to skwadadchelh,
ƛ'ub čəxʷ ʔuxʷəbyitubuɬ ʔə kʷi dᶻəkʼʷadadcəɬ,
rhōlăbă kw' orhŭbĭechělh ă tă lălě assilhtamerh atodskwadad twal debalh.
x̌ʷulʼəb ʔə kʷ(i) ʔuxʷəbyitcəɬ ʔə tə ləliʔ ʔaciɬtalbixʷ ʔə tə dᶻəkʼʷadad dxʷʔal dibəɬ.
Klob chor otsellalektoboh twalh gwalh mok skwadad schassand,
ƛ'ub čəxʷ ʔuc̕əlalikʷtubuɬ dxʷʔal gʷəɬ bəkʼʷ dᶻəkʼʷadad sčəsad,
gulo klob chorh ŏlēlto-bolh tolak mok sa!
gʷəl ƛ'ub čəxʷ ʔuliltubuɬ tulʼʔal kʷi bəkʼʷ saʔ!
Klob āssīstă!
ƛ'ub ʔəsʔistəʔ.
